idea.name: Idea Room
idea.description: Explore opportunities, user problems, and rough founder ideas.

build.name: Build Room
build.description: Work around other builders who are shipping MVPs today.

feedback.name: Feedback Room
feedback.description: Ask for quick eyes on positioning, flows, or product clarity.

growth.name: Growth Room
growth.description: Move first-user, launch, and outreach work forward.

home.description: Clock in, see who else is building, ask for a ten-minute desk check, and clock out with something shipped.

clockIn.title: Choose your floor for today
clockIn.description: You can join with a product, an idea, or just a direction you want to explore. Project information is optional.
clockIn.projectPlaceholder: Leave this blank if you are exploring
clockIn.goalPlaceholder: Clarify my one-line pitch, test onboarding, or send first-user outreach
clockIn.defaultGoal: Make one visible piece of progress today

office.title: Today's floor
office.description: See who is nearby, ask for a quick desk check, then clock out with one concrete piece of progress.
office.liveConnected: {count, plural, =0 {Live floor connected. No real coworker in this room yet.} =1 {Live floor connected. # real coworker in this room.} other {Live floor connected. # real coworkers in this room.}}
office.liveError: Live floor had a connection issue. Local demo coworkers remain available.
office.liveDemo: Local demo mode. Supabase variables are not configured.
office.demoMia: Testing a landing page for an AI education tool
office.demoAlex: Cutting scope for a sales copilot MVP
office.demoSam: Looking for a first niche in founder operations

deskCheck.title: Ask for ten minutes
deskCheck.description: Use one small question that another founder can answer quickly. The goal is a useful nudge, not a meeting.
deskCheck.templatePrompt: Can someone read my one-line pitch and tell me the first unclear part?
deskCheck.templateOutcome: One sharper sentence and one follow-up question.
deskCheck.question: My quick question

coffee.title: Choose a small voice room
coffee.description: Pick a public coffee room, set a topic if you are first, then join a short founder conversation.

founder-lounge.name: Founder Lounge
founder-lounge.description: Open casual talk for solo founders who just want coworkers nearby.

ai-builders.name: AI Builders
ai-builders.description: Talk about agents, product ideas, tooling, and what you are building today.

first-users.name: First Users
first-users.description: Discuss user testing, launch, distribution, and early customer feedback.

quiet-build.name: Quiet Build Table
quiet-build.description: A calmer room for light coworking and short check-ins.

coffee.open: {count, plural, =0 {No seats open} =1 {# seat open} other {# seats open}}
coffee.errorStatus: Live table had a connection issue. The meeting link still works.
coffee.demo: Local demo mode. Supabase variables are not configured.
coffee.watching: Watching the live seat state before you join.
coffee.disconnected: Realtime is disconnected. The meeting room can still open, and the personal demo flow is unaffected.
coffee.fullNotice: The four-seat table is full. Stay on this page to watch for an open seat.
coffee.joinTitle: Join to open the live table
coffee.joinDescription: The meeting is embedded only after you take a seat. Each coffee room has its own deterministic meeting link.

elevator.title: Thirty seconds, real listeners
elevator.description: One founder pitches while everyone else listens, reacts, and leaves a useful question.
elevator.audience: {count, plural, =1 {# audience member} other {# audience members}}
elevator.errorStatus: Live stage had a connection issue. The meeting link still works.
elevator.demo: Local demo mode. Supabase variables are not configured.
elevator.tracking: Connecting to the shared stage before roles are tracked.
elevator.disconnected: Realtime is disconnected. You can still use the meeting room and save a local result.
elevator.blocked: One speaker is already on stage. Join as audience or wait for reset.
elevator.couldBeUser: I could be a user or know one
elevator.question: One useful question
elevator.questionPlaceholder: Who is the first target user?
elevator.feedbackPending: Audience feedback will appear here in realtime.
elevator.joinTitle: Join the stage to open the room
elevator.joinDescription: Speakers and audience use the same deterministic Jitsi room for this event.

clockOut.noneDescription: Clock in first, then return to ship progress.
clockOut.title: Ship one thing
clockOut.description: Record the concrete progress from this work session. A link is useful, but a decision or sharper sentence also counts.
clockOut.evidencePlaceholder: Paste a link, note the change, or describe the decision
clockOut.helpedPlaceholder: Mia, Alex, or the Feedback Room
clockOut.publish: Clock out and publish to Ship Wall

workLog.title: Your clock-ins and your forest
workLog.description: Every clock-in is kept here, and every finished piece of work plants a tree. The forest grows with what you finish, not with the clock.
workLog.forestCount: {count, plural, =0 {No trees yet} =1 {# tree} other {# trees}}
workLog.forestDescription: Each ship plants a tree. Each completed desk check plants a sprout. Nothing here withers.
workLog.forestEmpty: Ship your first piece of work or complete a desk check to plant your first tree.
workLog.milestoneMax: You have grown past every milestone. Keep going.
workLog.historyDescription: Past work sessions, kept even after you clock out or switch rooms.
workLog.historyEmpty: No clock-ins yet. Clock in to start your first record.

shipWall.title: Progress people can see
shipWall.noneDescription: Clock in, ask for a desk check if needed, then publish one visible piece of progress here.

meeting.audio: Audio and video start muted. Use headphones in the venue.
meeting.slow: The meeting embed is taking longer than expected. Use Open meeting if the frame stays blank.
meeting.fallback: Use the external meeting button. Room: {room}

realtime.title: Live mode
realtime.enabled: Supabase realtime is connected. Live rooms are ready.
realtime.disabled: Live rooms are unavailable, so the app will use local demo mode without crashing.
